goal: Stop the selection board loading the full-size 00-back; use the 200px thumbnail
done: getCardBackUrl(data.js) now takes {thumb}: thumb:true returns 00-back-200.webp (~12-20KB) instead of the full 00-back.webp (99-410KB). main.js applyCardBackBackground takes {thumb} and the board call sites (staticCardBacks + per-tile cardBack) pass thumb:true. Reading-flip + card-image fallback paths keep full-res (no thumb).
root_cause: The 12-tile selection board rendered the full 00-back (163KB moonmallow, up to 410KB veila) at ~40-64px, blocking first board paint, while the matching 00-back-200 thumbnails sat unused on the CDN.
fix: Board backs use 00-back-200 (12-24x lighter first paint). Verified live (chrome-devtools): all 12 board tiles load 00-back-200.webp.
verified: Browser: question-draw board renders 12 backs all from 00-back-200.webp; reading-flip path still full 00-back.
